summary.goal: Quick-call map for Hugging Face, Kaggle, and Colab so SCBE assets can be evaluated, routed into datasets, and reused for training.

kaggle.local_secret_shape: KAGGLE_API_TOKEN is present locally and the newer kaggle client attempts token introspection.

observed_results.config: quick-call loads username + API token in process
observed_results.datasets: sandbox fetch blocked before remote list returns
observed_results.models: sandbox fetch blocked before remote list returns
observed_results.kernels: sandbox fetch blocked before remote list returns
observed_results.competitions: sandbox fetch blocked before remote list returns

next_fix: Run the quick-call Kaggle inventory action in a normal local shell outside the Codex sandbox
Persist the resulting CSV files under artifacts/host_inventory
Use Kaggle primarily as a remote notebook/competition lane after the inventory snapshot is captured

priority_notebooks.name: scbe-finetune-free
priority_notebooks.purpose: Free T4 LoRA fine-tune lane for governance data.

priority_notebooks.name: aethermoor-datagen
priority_notebooks.purpose: Generate or expand Aethermoor training data.

priority_notebooks.name: cloud-workspace
priority_notebooks.purpose: General Colab compute workspace for SCBE experiments.

evaluate_models.label: Legacy HF compliance eval
evaluate_models.purpose: Run the legacy SCBE compliance eval suite against a hosted text-generation model.

build_trainable_datasets.label: Cloud kernel dataset pipeline
build_trainable_datasets.purpose: Build, verify, audit, and optionally ship curated training datasets to cloud sinks.

build_trainable_datasets.label: Autonomous HF training loop
build_trainable_datasets.purpose: Collect local interaction/game-session data and push approved JSONL batches to a Hugging Face dataset repo.

dataset_targets.purpose: Primary SFT corpus for trainable instruction-response data.
Grounding corpus for retrieval, fact-checking, and knowledge export.
Curated interaction logs before promotion into training data.

route_to_colab.label: Notebook catalog
route_to_colab.purpose: Resolve the right Colab notebook and direct Colab URL before running training.

recommended_sequence: Evaluate the live HF models first with scripts/eval_legacy_hf_model.py
Choose a Colab notebook from scripts/system/colab_workflow_catalog.py
Run scripts/cloud_kernel_data_pipeline.py to consolidate trainable records
Push or sync the approved dataset into SCBE-AETHER dataset repos
Run the Kaggle inventory action in a normal local shell when you need Kaggle-side notebook or competition work
